title: hohenbergia distans
intro: Hohenbergia distans is a species of flowering plant in the bromeliad family, native to Brazil. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, as it contains expectorant compounds that help to relieve congestion and coughs. The health benefits of Hohenbergia distans include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe sore throats and reduce swelling. In herbal preparations, Hohenbergia distans is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
